headline: Álvaro Arbeloa
body: Fulham confirm Álvaro Arbeloa as their new head coach on a three year contract.🏡 🗣️ Arbeloa: “It is a real honour for me to be embarking on this new stage at Fulham FC, the oldest club in London. I feel a great sense of responsibility and I'm deeply grateful to Mr. Khan and Tony Khan for the trust they have placed in me with Fulham in the Premier League.
raw_text:
Fulham confirm Álvaro Arbeloa as their new head coach on a three year contract.🏡

🗣️ Arbeloa: “It is a real honour for me to be embarking on this new stage at Fulham FC, the oldest club in London. I feel a great sense of responsibility and I'm deeply grateful to Mr. Khan and Tony Khan for the trust they have placed in me with Fulham in the Premier League."
text:
Fulham confirm Álvaro Arbeloa as their new head coach on a three year contract.🏡

🗣️ Arbeloa: “It is a real honour for me to be embarking on this new stage at Fulham FC, the oldest club in London. I feel a great sense of responsibility and I'm deeply grateful to Mr. Khan and Tony Khan for the trust they have placed in me with Fulham in the Premier League."
draft_caption:
🎩 MANAGER- ÁLVARO ARBELOA LINKED WITH THE FULHAM JOB.
